_comment: Bad case 14 — PATTERN_ENTRY auto-correction when pilot reaches the ground. auto_corrections.PATTERN_ENTRY.on_ground has delay_sec: 3.0. Covers the case where a pilot forgets to get a landing clearance, touches down anyway and coasts to a stop — the engine must drop back to IDLE instead of hanging on PATTERN_ENTRY forever.
name: Bad case 14 — PATTERN_ENTRY -> IDLE on ground (KPAO US)

context.callsign: November One Two Three Alpha Bravo

say.text: Palo Alto Tower November One Two Three Alpha Bravo inbound for landing

say.note: Pilot is now on the ground, slow
4 sec on ground — PATTERN_ENTRY.on_ground auto-correction (delay 3s) must fire
